cjsah_masa_extension.config.option.syncA: Open every container within the selected area once to sync the items inside those containers to ChestTracker. (Requires ChestTracker)
cjsah_masa_extension.config.option.hudDa: After previewing a container, sync the previewed contents to ChestTracker. (Requires ChestTracker)
cjsah_masa_extension.config.option.selec: In the Material List, also count items stored in containers within the selected area as already available items. (Requires ChestTracker)
cjsah_masa_extension.config.option.entit:
Include entities from the schematic in the Material List as well.
e.g., item frames and the items
cjsah_masa_extension.config.option.conta: Items inside containers in the schematic are also counted as required materials.
